review_text: A great place to visit .

Magnificent!
The staff are friendly and welcome you with a smile. The spa cabin is spectacular with breathtaking views day and night. Extremely clean. I will return to this marvelous sanctuary yearly for a wonderful break.

Excellent spot.
Close to the beach.
Clean and tidy

We stayed 4 nights last week in a Norfolk cabin, the stay could not be better from the front desk staff who were  very happy and welcoming on check in and with questions we had during our stay.  The cabin we stayed in was clean and everything worked as intended ( awesome hot showers)
We will be staying there again. Thank you !

We were staying at the Big4 East Moruya, which is the big sister of the Big4 East at Kiama. We had pre-booked at Moruya and Big4 east at Kiama. When you pre-book, at either of these Big4 East Parks. If you or your family member has a disability. And don’t want a step into bath shower. As the step in bath showers. Don’t have wall bars to hang onto, in case you slip. You have to let them know, while you are booking the Cabin. As this very busy Park, may NOT. Have a spare cabin with a normal walk in shower door. As we didn’t know this when we arrived at Big4 at Moruya. Luckily being late February 2026. They had plenty of very comfortable other cabins they could accommodate us in. A Big Thank you to Jodie, at Moruya for helping our needs. For an easy walk in shower door. We called the Big4 East immediately at Kiama. And our Cabin there was also, a step into bath shower. Unfortunately, the dates booked at Kiama. Kiama was having a big event in the town. And they couldn’t accommodate us into another Cabin. They did refund our full amount. That we had pre-paid. Thank you to the very helpful staff on the day that we spoke to them. Unfortunately it was a huge event in Kiama, that weekend. We tried all parks in the surrounding coastal districts. With no luck. We were heading back to the Gold Coast. And got a nice comfortable cabin at Mittagong caravan park for a few days. The staff at Moruya and Kiama, couldn’t have been more helpful. I did read a review for the Kiama East holiday park. That they have security walking around at night. That might be something to keep in mind. No problems of this kind at Moruya East holiday park.
We had a wonderful long weekend here

I had a beautiful holiday 17/4/26 with my daughter and 2 grandchildren for four nites and again was absolutely so happy to have made more memories here, the staff are so lovely and accommodating the service is next to none and help the facilities outstanding and the accommodation perfect I cannot say anything negative about our stay we made lots of memories that will never be forgotten This is the 3rd or 4th stay here and won’t be our last that’s 💯 guaranteed
So thanks you Big 4 Kiama for being so welcoming and making families dreams come true
One of our best caravan parks! This park is situation right along Easts Beach, and the sites near the water are amazing. Perfect during off-peak when it is nice and quiet!

Great location. Professionally run and all staff unfailingly helpful. Large park but spotlessly clean. Cleanest van park pool we've been in. Ducks are cute, but ducks do do, what ducks do...
PS. Did somebody really write it was safe because of no kangaroos???
Very neat restrooms,bath areas,good sized pool, nice beach..no kangaroos roaming around the tent,so it's safe and tidy around the camping ground,worth for money.
Amazing place. I've been trying to come back for years..just hard to find availability!
wonderfull beach. units well looked after
One of the best place. Lots of activities for kids. East beach and kiama coast walk picnic area and lookout views was amazing.

We recently had an fabulous extended family gathering staying across 4 cabins to celebrate a 70th birthday. I stayed in a seabreeze cabin which was excellent. Great size for two families. Came with everything you need. Beautiful views.
Kids loved all the facilities.
Great suprise to receive a complementary 4pm check out for everyone.
Can't wait to go back!
Amazing place for a young family. Prime location near beach, with splash park and dry play grounds also. Would recommend to anyone

Our stay at Easts Big 4 was nothing short of amazing! From the moment we arrived, the entire team greeted us with warmth and friendliness, making us feel very welcome! We were celebrating our wedding, and each member of the staff went above and beyond to ensure everyone was well taken care of and assisted whenever needed.

The park itself was impeccably clean and beautifully maintained, with the bins emptied many times a day. Friendly staff often asked if they could assist in any way. Our cabin was simply magical, with breathtaking views that made our experience even more memorable. It truly felt like a little slice of paradise.

I can't recommend Easts Big 4 enough. The combination of outstanding service, a pristine environment, and stunning accommodations made our wedding celebration unforgettable.

The Games Room, Splash Pool, and Swimming Pool were all in clean and perfect condition. All of our guests complimented how wonderful the park was. We will be making this a regular trip. Thank you, Big 4 Easts!

This is our, once a year go to, for a relaxing break.
We take our Pod and set up for 12 nights, and we love it!

Another wonderful family weekend at East's beach a shout out to the staff who are all helpful, presonable and show a pride in thier work. Weather was kind to us this year nobody has control over the weather it is what it is! That said there are always lot of things to do.
'Keep up the good work

We camped using an ensuite site. The ensuite was so clean, spacious and the water pressure was bliss. So many things for our kids to do, we didn't even leave the park. Very well setup for a family holiday.
Family holiday, so much to do or not do, great facilities , lovely staff and to top it off great coffee

We have th best spot in front of the beach, great facilities for the whole family. Very clean. Water parks ,jumping pillows swimming pools the game room, the kids loved them all. Friendly staff..close to the grocery shop. You couldn't ask for more. We just enjoyed our stay. This is our second time we stayed at BIG4 sites. Fun Fun Fun for the whole Family.

Super park - great facilities for families - pools and play areas - park has direct access to water for paddling - beautiful boardwalk and very close to seal rocks - where if you are lucky - lots of seals lounging and swimming.  Clean amenities - staff help you into your pitch - very easy set - I did move pitch after the first night - managed and coordinated quickly through helpful and polite reception team.

We come here every year and it has become a special part of our family traditions.
This place is amazing for kids. Between the water park, swimming pool, jumping pillow, arcade and soft play area there is always something for them to do. Our girls absolutely love it and it makes the whole trip easy and fun for everyone.
The cabins are very clean and set up perfectly for families. The kitchen facilities are great and make it simple to cook meals and settle in for a few days.
The team also work constantly to keep the park looking great. You see them around throughout the day maintaining the grounds and cleaning the BBQ areas daily, which makes a big difference and keeps everything feeling fresh and well cared for.
The location is beautiful too. The ocean and headland walks are stunning and make it feel like a proper coastal escape.
It is such a special place for a family holiday and we always look forward to coming back.

Amazing place for families to relax and enjoy. Massive BBQ areas, our caravan powered site was great and people are so welcoming and friendly.
Definitely family orientated.
We're coming back here next year
From amazing girls in reception (Sunday staff afternoon) to the amazing Toby who helped out with our big rig on a site - welcome pack but just so friendly from all thank you!

The park is great. The kids loved the water park, jumping pillow, pool and beach. Everything has a premium considerate feel. The reception is full of smiles and genuine happiness. We will definitely be going back.

Easts Beach Holiday Park Kiama is the cleanest park we have ever stayed in.|The facilities are fantastic, every need was catered for.|Access to a fabulous beach was walking distance.|We highly recommend this park, especially for families, swimming pools, jumping pillow and splash park.  The best
Wonderful place, extremely clean and well kept, staff extremely friendly and helpful. We would go again as the location and accommodation are first class.

This was our first camping trip with two young kids and it was the best little holiday we have had a in a long time. We had an ensuite site which was clean snd spacious. The park itself was huge and offered many different types of accommodation to suit everyone. The little kids pool attached to the big pool was perfect for our young kids- my 4 year old would have spent all day in it. The splash park was great and the games room and indoor play gym was perfect for the rainiy day we had. There is a cafe on site however it is only open on weekends during the off season. You have your own private beach and the kiama town was only a few minutes drive. Will definitely return.
Top notch. Fun park with lots to do with kids. Ensuite facilities were the best you’ll see. Lots to do in Kiama. We’ll be back

I solo camped here, the sites around me were occupied also but it was lovely and peaceful, everyone was respectful of each other and the park staff kept the park well manicured and clean at all times.

I very much had a lazy stay for 4 days, I fished, I ate, I read, took walks around the park and beach, I daydreamed.

The reception crew were a pleasure to deal with and very helpful.

I felt very comfortable staying here and look forward to staying in the future.

We camped on a powered site and it was great. The turf patch was such a nice surprise to see as we didn’t know when we booked. Bathrooms were always clean and was nice to see staff always around the grounds with happy smiles. Was also cute to have the ducks come and say hello too. Especially the one we called Poppy (has one leg ) we loved it so much we are coming back next year too. Thanks team

Excellent staff and facilities
One of the best places we have stayed at and Kiama was a beautiful town.

We love BIG4 East's Beach. This is our 3rd or 4th year staying. There's so much to do, especially for the kids and it's close to Kiama for shopping and entertainment. The accommodation is always clean and comfortable.
Beautiful place kids loved it definitely will be back

Perfect location to share with family and friends, a very well run park with great facilities and wonderful staff, especially the patient and helpful Ladies on reception:) Thank you Big4 East Beach, we will be back for sure!

Big park. 1st time camper at this place; the site for the tent was good with power if needed. Train line is close but after the first night it became less noticeable. They have a security team that wanders the park at night for your safety. Unfortunately for the kids, the water park wasn’t in operation, not sure why. We ended up going to the Jamberoo water park. Facilities were good, the common kitchen was clean as were the toilets. Reception staff were knowledgeable and friendly. The only thing I’d recommend is to fence off the creek that flows under the train line and into the park, our 12yo fell in up to his waist at night whilst “exploring”… a smaller child would struggle to get out if they fell in near the tunnel.
Park is very well maintained. Had a great stay.

We paid $169 for one night in our camper. Unfortunately, the site was covered in bird droppings. The restrooms were also very dirty. It was the night of January 25th to 26th. Far too expensive for us.

This place is Amazing! Exceeded expectations!
I just stayed here for a few nights with my 2  kids and both my husband and I thoroughly enjoyed it.
We stayed in an Ocean Villa and the room was tidy and very clean, we could not fault the cleanliness of the villa.
The villa itself is amazing ocean front and hearing the waves was just breathless.
The facilities for the kids including the slash park, pool and kids club are just an added bonus for the kids which they loved.
We will definitely be re booking very soon.

Hello, my wife and I contacted you to apologize for the mistakes we made and the rules we didn't follow many times. Last year was the first time this happened, and we are very sorry. Our long-standing holiday with our children was cancelled. The children don't want to go anywhere else. We are very happy with the safety and cleanliness of this place. The rules are very good, but sometimes we can't control the children. I apologize again and guarantee that if we are given another chance, I will make amends. If you accept, please contact me or call my wife, Fatma. I hope you understand.

Me and my family were there from the 4th January till the 11th January and I couldn’t be happier with the service they provided us. Also it’s an amazing place for kids of all ages.

Thank you for having us❤️❤️❤️❤️

We just had a fabulous week at East's beach, Kiama. We were up in the holiday villas on the hill where the rooms had everything we needed including a clothes line, nearby laundry and bbq. The kids club activities were well run - our daughter loved them. Our youngest (2) loved the toddler pool with it being so warm and just 70 cms deep so he could touch the floor with ease. It was also just deep enough for me to get my bicycle legs exercises in everyday whilst playing with him! The main pool was cool on the cooler days but it warmed up nicely each afternoon.

The holiday villa, whilst a little out of the way from everything else was good with the covered car ports which subsequently kept the bedrooms darker and cooler - a win for toddler naps. I'd bought my blackout blind and didn't need it. The beds were comfortable and the villa was clean. Staff we're readily available at reception for anything we needed and they were always so nice.

The games room is a little dated but does a decent job and the two playgrounds were great. I would love to see a shade sail installed over the toddler pool and main playground to help parents keep their little ones out of the sun - hopefully management see this message as I'm sure it would be very well received by families.

The splash park is fab too. The lifeguard was quick to re start the water each time it clicked off. The slides are excellent and the play area at the back where kids can redirect the water is perfect for little brains.

We saw dolphins at the beach one evening and all the guests seemed really pleasant - we even made some great friends who are planning on rebooking for next year to see us again.

Kiama town centre was just a 10 minute drive and has a full size woolworths with free parking. There's also some fast food places, a barbers, nail salon and pharmacy. Easy drive to both the big and small blowholes.

Overall a good experience. We will be back next year.

We were very disappointed with our recent booking experience at BIG4.
We received a written confirmation and paid a deposit for a Beach Retreat, but later we were informed that it was an internal staff error and the room was no longer available because another guest was described to us as a “valued customer” wishing to re-book the same accommodation for two weeks.

Instead of honouring the confirmed booking, we were asked to switch to different accommodation with lower conditions, or accept a refund by next working day. The only “compensation” offered was a 10%  but far to the beach.

It is frustrating to see that a confirmed booking could be taken away days later, with no equal alternative or meaningful compensation provided. This affected our holiday planning even though it’s next year holiday, and it raises concerns for other families in our group. Families planning future stays may reasonably be concerned that even a carefully planned holiday could be cancelled unilaterally if another “valued” customer later requests the same accommodation.

We hope management reviews how confirmed reservations and customer communication are handled.

==== updated on 05 Jan 2026

For the record, your public response does not accurately reflect the actual sequence of events.
To avoid further misrepresentation, I would like to clarify the facts clearly and chronologically:
1.	15 December 2025 – We paid the deposit and received a written booking confirmation for the Beach Retreat.
Prior to making payment, we confirmed the availability of this accommodation with an experienced staff member, who had previously been in contact with us in 2024 regarding our 2025 booking. Based on this confirmation, we proceeded with the reservation in good faith.
2.	19 December 2025 – We were contacted by phone and informed that another guest wished to book the same accommodation for two weeks, and that our confirmed booking was therefore a “staff error”.
On the same day, we lodged a formal case with Fair Trading and requested that this matter be escalated to management.
3.	22 December 2025 – We clearly advised in writing that no further action was to be taken on our booking until Fair Trading had provided guidance, and again requested escalation.
4.	23 December 2025 – Despite no escalation having occurred and before receiving any response or direction from Fair Trading, BIG4 unilaterally cancelled our confirmed booking. Our family has been booking and holidaying with BIG4 continuously since 2023, and we are therefore not new customers. This booking is also part of a family group booking, for which multiple cabins were reserved, deposits were paid, and written confirmation emails were issued.

Notably, only the Beach Retreat booking was subsequently cancelled, while the other confirmed bookings within the same group reservation were not affected.

At no point was Fair Trading direction received prior to the cancellation.
The statement that this matter was resolved “as discussed verbally and via email” or that options were “amicably provided” is therefore misleading.

A full refund was issued only after the booking had already been cancelled against our explicit instructions and while the Fair Trading case was still ongoing.

We are sharing this clarification so that other families can understand how confirmed bookings may be handled, and so that the public record accurately reflects what occurred.

We’ve stayed here 3 times. First 2 times were amazing. This time was disappointing and we won’t be coming back. I’m unsure if it was the guests at the park this time around or maybe less of a cleaning schedule being public holidays, however the amenities were disgusting. I had to complain once and it didn’t change anything they were still extremely bad. We have photos on our phones of how horrible they were. There needs to be more daily and consistent checks if that’s how some disrespectful guests are treating the place. It’s so unfair on them as employees but something has to change because the good guests get the brunt of it /the poor cleaners. We couldn’t use the amenities at all, we had to use our caravan for everything but the amenities are in our rate and it’s so unfair how this week cost me and my family for 2 sites so much money when things were unusable!!! You’ve lost me as a customer now just from this weeks experience. Also it’s a premier park and this shouldn’t be happening.. especially for the rates you pay..   Even the pool area smelt like sewers this time around. We left the pool multiple times from the stench.. I think a few employees should go stand around the pool chairs and figure out where it’s coming from.. maybe the tiles need a proper scrub, maybe little kids have been peeing.. unsure. Also Christmas night was horrible for us on b4 and b5 and I spent it holding my baby back to sleep from being woken up from the fire alarm going off in the toilet block behind us.. even that felt wrong that no one cared or asked how we were after that night. I had to ring after hours to let someone know it was going off for the 2nd time. Horrible night for me as a parent soothing my baby back to sleep multiple times. Anyway it’s done now but a shame no one cares.
Awesome spot 👌 Great Service 👍
Best Big 4 we have been to.

Fantastic location at the beach. Everything we did in the local area was a 10-30 minute drive. (Beaches, blow holes, rainforrest, jamberoo action park) Bike riding out of the park needs e bike for all those hills. Park was clean and tidy. Heated pool. Watermark. Jumping pillow. Cafe with nice food.

This was an excellent experience for a family with young children. The staff were very friendly, especially Monic, the receptionist, who was professional and courteous. The holiday park has a great location, close to Kiama Centre. We stayed in a holiday villa and the room was spotless. All the facilities were excellent! We will definitely be coming back for another visit. Highly recommend.

We recently organised a large group booking at Kiama East Beach Holiday Park for my grandmother’s 90th birthday, bringing together 50 family members for the weekend and I can honestly say it exceeded every expectation.
From the moment we arrived, everything was seamless. The cabins were beautifully clean, comfortable, and provided such a great night’s sleep. The facilities are truly next-level: a huge pool with a dedicated kids’ area, an incredible water park that my children never wanted to leave, a jumping pillow, and a fantastic kids’ games room with a small indoor climbing playground which was perfect when the weather turned rainy.
The kids’ club was a huge highlight. My children absolutely loved making chocolate rice bubble slices, money boxes, and even bouncy balls. It was such a thoughtful and engaging experience for them.
What truly made our weekend unforgettable, though, was the staff. They were beyond accommodating and went above and beyond to ensure our large group was comfortable and well looked after. We were even able to hire the hall on Saturday night to celebrate together, and they effortlessly accommodated our catering company. Everything ran so smoothly, allowing us to simply relax and enjoy being together as a family.
I cannot thank the team at Kiama East Beach Holiday Park enough for their incredible hospitality. We had the best weekend, created beautiful memories, and left feeling so grateful.
As we drove out, my son summed it up perfectly when he said:
“Mum, can we move here one day?”
We will absolutely be back.
Everything is perfectly location is the best part as the facility has everything for kids to keep them entertained.
Another fantastic time was had by all my family and friends, this park is just fabulous, wonderful amenities and right on the beach, wholeheartedly recommended
Great spot for a family or friends getaway. Clean, well-kept, with excellent facilities and plenty for the kids to do. And the beach—absolutely stunning.
Great place, awsome location and perfect fit for family holidays
Coldddd

Moor lokatie, direct aan strand en baai van de zee.
Zeer grote holyday camping. Grote plaatsen en schoon. Wij hadden een heerlijke plaats waar goed veel schaduw was.
Sanitair is schoon en voldoende. Waslijnen en wasgelegenheid.

Nice campground with clean facilities.
Beautiful pool area and directly at the beach.
Had a great 2 night stay in a cabin. Close to everything. Courtesy bus to clubs. Friendly staff and easy check in/out
Booked the ensuite suite and it was an amazing experience with so many facilities. We will be coming back

Super Campingplatz sehr gepflegt und sauber. Ein Paradies für Kinder und auch Erwachsene mit dem Strand direkt vor dem Campingplatz. Ein Stern Abzug bezüglich der Lage da man das Auto braucht um ins Zetrum von Kiama zu kommen. Keine Bäckerei oder Restaurants zu Fuss erreichbar. Und bei den hinteren Stellplätzen ist der vorbeifahrende Zug sehr laut zu hören. Würden wieder kommen :)
What a brilliant park! One of the best, by far
Wonderful park right on the beach. Fantastic facilities for families. Generous sites and very well maintained park with friendly welcoming staff. Will definitely be back.
Great as always
Such a brilliant place to take kids on school holidays, all the cabins have what you need added in, honestly worth every single penny!!!! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Beautiful park and stunning location. It's a massive park with great facilities for the kids to enjoy

From the moment I entered reception the lovely ladies made us feel welcome, very positive experience. Once we found our site we hadn’t even unhitched or van and we had an employee stop what he was doing  and again run us through the park details I.e quickest ways to the beach and other amenities. I watched the same guy do this to every car that turned up and was awesome to see. The park itself is beautiful, clean and well equipped. Can’t wait to go back.||Thanks again guys

Absolutely fabulous place for kids & super enjoyable for the 'oldies' too.||The rooms were spotless & staff were friendly & helpful. || No time for the kids to get bored because there was so much to do.  ||This was our first time at BIG4 Easts Beach, but definitely not the last.

Very friendly staff. Very tidy and clean park with lots for the kiddies to do. Great location for a family holiday. Didn't have a lot of time there, just one night, but do intend to visit for longer next time.
Caravan Park and Holiday Cabins - excellent family park, great location with superb facilities for adults and kids alike and well managed.

Feeling slightly disappointed, friends of mine have booked a site for this weekend 1/11-2/11 and suggested as a spontaneous adventure for my two kids if I brought them down for one night, roll out two swags on their site. They phoned the caravan park today to see how much extra for 1 adult and 2 kids, the park would not allow 3 additional people on their site, however they had one grass site available. I phoned later to book the grass site, they advised that it is a minimum 2 nights however I could call on the day to see if it is free and they will book it in, am i supposed to pack everything in the hope that Saturday morning it is free just to unpack and let the kids down, they were not customer friendly on the phone and I felt shut down straight away. Why cant 1 additional adult and 2 small kids who is willing to pay for their stay not able to roll out swags in their friends site that is already booked!
Great service, awesome park. Very clean and tidy. Awesome location for a great family holiday.
Perfect holiday

Great facilities
A little crowded but still awesome.
Great service from the staff here, thank you!
Good place for the family

We stayed in our own caravan but used the amenities which were always clean and tidy.
Lovely surrounds and just a little stroll to the beach
Stayed in a deluxe cabin right on the beach, couldn’t fault it. Weather wasn’t great but everything else was spot on. Definitely recommend!
Lovely place, really clean and facilities were great, we were in 2nd row villa to the beach and it was so convenient to go every morning. I would highly recommend staying here with kids.
A great place, a short drive from Sydney and an opportunity to unwind with the family. Great facilities, friendly atmosphere.

Our stay at this holiday park was very disappointing. We stayed with friends and had high hopes for our trip as it was our first time there. The staff were unhelpful, made us feel very unwelcome and the staff's attitude left a lot to be desired. They were abrupt and unaccomodating which we ended up cutting our trip short and would not recommend this place to others. This really affected our first holiday experience.
Wonderful stay. Ocean cabins are in a great location, rooms are clean and have great water pressure. The staff were super lovely and friendly. Would definitely stay again..
This place is amazing! We will definitely be coming back again. The cabin was amazing and cozy. The facilities are great also. The staff are lovely and accommodating :)
Amazing, we had a great time. However disappointed that we can't bring our fur baby.

We had a great stay at Kiama. The park is sensational with easy access to the beach. Plenty of activities for the whole family and close to clubs and pubs. Our cabin was spotlessly clean when we arrived too.

We recently stayed at BIG4 Kiama and had the best experience! The facilities are spotless and well-maintained, the staff are incredibly friendly and welcoming, and there are so many great amenities for kids! Everything you need is right there, and the beach is absolutely beautiful. Couldn’t ask for a better place to stay – highly recommend!
Great place for families, kids, plenty to do, beach, pools, climbing activities, cafe, close to shops, walks,fishing,  awesome place for families
Best spot on the south Coast. Only 1 hr from the Shire. Great beach, pool and amenities.
Very nice and clean. Packed caravan and checked out before 10. Asked if we could still use pool, but wanted extra fee.
A great holiday park in a great location
Fantastic park for families. Everything well maintained and clean. Kids loved the pools and slides! Will be returning again
Beautiful, very clean, well maintained  caravan park...  Sites are very generous in size ..Plenty of entertainment for the kids.. Lovely staff . See you next time .

We took our tiny caravan to BIG4 Easts and enjoyed a week by the beach. We had an ensuite site, and the bathroom was the best I've ever seen. It was large, very clean and had a very large space for hanging clothes and changing. Overall, a terrific holiday at a great location.
Camping site was perfect. Ground staff and amenities were spotless. Loved every second we were there. Thank you.

I have stayed at the park many times dating back to the 90's
What brings me back is not only that my adult kids have some of the most memorable memories but it is definitely the cleanest and best run park I have ever been at.
I will certainly be back again
Quiet, spacious room
Great place to stay with kids!

Awesome beach, had lots of great rooms and the bedrooms were amazing. There were a few other things that they could add but apart from that, everything was pretty much amazing. The pool was very warm, which we thought was nice. And that’s pretty much all that I have to say about. So, whoever reads this, you should really go to this holiday park.
Lovely park right on the beach
Fantastic spot
Great staff  and so clean and tidy great park fore all and kids

Friendly staff.  Cabin was very clean one of the best I have been in. It shows that the staff take pride in their work. Was great looking out to the ocean. Park very well set out. Congratulations to all the workers on doing such a great job. We will be back. Highly recommended.
What can I say, I would definitely recommend this caravan park to everyone.
We camped on an ensuite site, the amenities were great, nice spot. There is a train line very close and the coal trains are very loud at night
Very nice caravan park with everything, strongly recommended
We were so pleased with the level of customer service from all staff at this Park, they were all so welcoming and helpful. Location and facilities were top notch!
We were in our caravan great staff great view great weather love the park amenities were spotless everything was great for our stay .
Seabreeze cabins are great for families with kids. Wouldn't change a thing and can't wait to return.

Clean and neat bathrooms.  Beautiful location and the whole park is beautiful!
Elise at reception was so helpful and friendly when we arrived!

Excellent staff and service! Clean and neat bathrooms & beautiful views. Absolutely stunning and loved our stay. Elise at reception deserves a special mention for her helpful and kind demeanour. Thank you for an awesome stay.

We recently spent 7 extremely enjoyable nights here on a powered en-suite site. The en-suites are fantastic! They are modern, spotlessly clean and have a really good floor plan that even includes a separate large walk in open cupboard. Great for hanging up raincoats, clothing, storing luggage etc.
The men’s and women’s amenities are large and modern and the laundries are spacious and have ample washers and driers. There are also dedicated children’s bathrooms . I’ve never seen this before. Bathrooms designed child sized. Primary school sized toilets, hand basins and small shower cubicles with low shower heads. Absolutely brilliant for children.
The park is in an excellent position for exploring the beautiful beaches and coastline. The coastal walk to the left of the caravan park beach goes past the little blowhole and into town and to the lighthouse. To the right it follows the coastal track to Gerringong. Incredibly beautiful walks. The track can get a little muddy after rain so wear hiking shoes/boots. Just 12 minutes drive away is the Saddleback mountain lookout. A must visit. Awesome views.
All in all a fantastic park in a fantastic location for exploring this incredible area.
Enjoyed staying at this park. Very clean cabin, plenty of room. Staff are friendly. Park is very clean . Close to the beach. Location is good.

We had a wonderful Easter break at Big4 Easts Beach Holiday Park. The location is perfect (right on the beach) and the park was buzzing with fun activities for the kids. The cabin was clean, comfy, and well-equipped, and the facilities were spotless and well-maintained.

The staff were friendly and helpful despite the busy holiday period, and the Easter events added a lovely touch for families. It is the perfect spot for a relaxing, fun-filled getaway. We will definitely be back!

One of the best Big4 parks we have visited. Excellent location, walkable distance to beach, little blow hole, cafes etc.
Only suggestion from my side is to have lighting on the streets inside the park after sunset. With kids in our group it was very scary for them when the streets are dark.
Awesome caravan park, the staff are friendly, facilities are well maintained and always clean.
Perfect camping spot for family holidays, the toilets were so clean!!! And both pools were just fantastic with onsite lifeguards.
What a great family friendly park. So much for the kids to do!!
Lovely sheltered beach, we stayed in a 5 person cabin. The only complaints would be that there was no PowerPoints in the second bedroom and the shower would not hold it's temperature.

Sites green, trees, beach.
But to make it better they have an amazing kids bathroom something that most caravan parks are dinosaurs with. Two kids showers, two kids toilets plus baby wash, right next door to the laundry so you can quickly pop your things in to wash while kids are showering.
Will definately be coming through to this Park again one day
Great caravan park, great location staff friendly and very helpful,  great place for a family holiday

We had a beautiful relaxing weekend with the family in the sea breeze cabins.  Thank you to all the staff especially Kat & Vicky for welcoming us with your amazing hospitality. We have been coming here for over 20years. If you haven’t been here yet definitely make it your next holiday.
Great park good facilities and direct access to the beach. Short drive back to town but secluded and quiet enough to feel separated from the hustle and bustle.
Awesome place for holidays
The worst holiday park ever. I didn’t feel welcomed during my stay and there was no hospitality from the staff. Never recommend

Had a lovely stay at the Easts Beach Holiday Park. Stayed in a cabin for two nights and we were impressed by the presentation of the cabin. The cleaners had done a great job and we were very comfortable.
The location suited us as the beach was a two minute walk. We walked from Kiama to Gerringong along the coastal trail and then got the train back to Kiama.

We had a great stay at East Beach Holiday Park.
We had a fantastic site right on the beach front. Sometimes mother nature throws a curve ball and she defiantly throw a big curve ball called King Tide.

The staff were fantastic with making sure all that were camping in that area were moved to a different site, to ensure that we were all safe.

Nothing was too much trouble for the grounds staff, they helped a young couple with children pack up and move.
The staff seems somewhat lacks a welcoming attitude.

Beautiful and well managed, ran by a friendly team who are very helpful.
Great location!
Will definitely come again.

Location is perfect, rooms are great, facilities are great and staff are friendly, but stay was extremely uncomfortable because of hammer knocking and drilling sounds starting 7:00 am every day of our stay, apparently the unit next to us was under renovation.

This made the stay extremely uncomfortable.

If the park knew they had ongoing renovations, they shouldn’t have rented the units adjacent to the unit undergoing such noisy works.

See the videos to know what we went through and what you may go through
We stayed at ensuite tent site. Very clean and nice. A lot of activities to do too
Excellent

Nice park, I don't think the price is great, if your older and not interested in jumping pillows, water park etc it's not cheap but if you have kids it's probably great value. Would benefit to price according to age group.
We stayed in a powered site with a caravan.

The facilities are excellent. Great staff and wonderful location.
If parks were only half as good as this park, every second Australian would on the road.
Well done team

5 Sterne
Weltklasse Familien-Campingplatz! Der Wasserpark ist ein Paradies für Kinder – sicher, sauber und mit viel Spielspass. Die gesamte Anlage ist hervorragend gepflegt, sehr sauber und top organisiert. Direkt am Strand gelegen, mit freundlichem Personal und allem, was man für einen entspannten Aufenthalt braucht. Sehr empfehlenswert!

Perfect facilities, nice Location on the beach, very cool waterpark for the kids and super helpful and friendly staff. Our car battery died the last day and they were able to help us out amd jump start it in no time. Thank you!

Very nice park with wonderful pool (best pool we had so far on our 5month trip). The showers and toilets are clean. Showers were a little too low for me- had to bend my knees to wash my hair (I am 1.78m).
We had wonderful days at the park, went on a walk to the little blowhole and climbed on the rocks besides the beach. My kids loved the kids showers!

Stayed with our large MH, a huge sprawling park, lots of people but surprisingly quiet. Beach front spots are awesome if you get one like we did last time, this time we were facing the creek which was pretty nice

My husband, son and I have been here twice and checked out today. Kathryn greeted us on arrival and was super lovely at explaining everything and what was happening around the park. (Activity wise). There’s so much to do!!! I had to have a go at the water slides at the amazing splash park and swim at the beach located from my sea breeze spa villa. The rooms and cabin were immaculate and the stay was comfortable, relaxing, incredible. This place offers a huge range of different styles of staying and we just can’t love this place and Kiama anymore if we tried. We will be back next year!!! ♥️
Nice park just very steep decent hill into park
Toller Campingplatz sehr gut gepflegt
Great family place we had great time beautiful beach walking distance from the mini blow hole, clean swimming pools aqua park area with safe gate for the kids amazing place definitely we will be back

“I recently had the pleasure of staying at East Beach Holiday Park in Kiama, and it was an unforgettable experience. From the moment I arrived, the staff went above and beyond to ensure my comfort and satisfaction.
The ocean view cabin we were in is now my favorite accommodation, coupled with exceptional service, made my stay truly memorable. The hotel’s prime location made exploring the town a breeze, and I can’t wait to return to relax on my next visit. Highly recommended!”
The cafe is amazing, the staff always available to help you out with your requests.
I will come back next year! Already booked 🤩

We are staying at Easts Beach Holiday Park for one night (30 January) on a Powered Site for 81 AUD—a considerable amount for what we got. Upon arrival, we were assigned site A2, which was covered in duck droppings and right next to the pool, meaning kids constantly ran through our spot. This was far from the experience we expected.

Wanting a more suitable site, I walked around the park and noticed several empty sites. When I asked at reception if we could move, I was told that F5 was the only available option, but after checking, it wasn’t worth the effort to relocate. When I inquired about other open sites (like F19 or spots in the E-block), I was informed that these cannot be allocated to small campervans—even though everyone pays the same price. This policy felt incredibly unfair and unwelcoming.

While we understand that parks need to manage their site allocations, this approach prioritizes convenience for the park over customer satisfaction. Why charge the same rate if smaller campervans are restricted from certain sites?
For a park with such a high price point, we expect better service and flexibility. Instead, we were left feeling frustrated and undervalued as guests. Would love to hear how the management justifies this approach.
Great place, polite staff, clean amenities and areas, plenty to do, highly recommended
Didnt go to the holiday park only went to the beach , which was beautiful 👍❤️
Lots of activities for kids and next to the beach, great facilities and cafe/restaurant with good food

From booking to the checking out everything was flawless. Our family had an amazing time over the New Years break. We had a powered site for our tent. Ample space for tent, gazebo and our car. The amenities were always spotless including the kitchen. But scraping tool for bbq is needed.
East beach is beautiful and the fireworks at Kiama harbour were spectacular!
Love Kiama
Loved the Big4
Отличный пляж. Рекомендую.

Great camping spot and facilities. The pools were fun and the beach is great for little ones. The camp kitchen was perfect with many cool tops and fridges available. We also loved the cafe. The hot chips were the best. Thanks for a great weekend

Spent 3 nights, great spot. Cabins are clean and comfortable. Beach is literally a 20 second walk, everything is so close, kids loved the heated pool and splash park, resort provides arts and crafts for kids (mum and dad resting). So much for kids to do.

We had an amazing time at this park. The facilities are top-notch, and the location is perfect for a relaxing family getaway. The kids loved the playground, heated pool, water park and jumping pillow, the beach was just a short walk away to. Everything was clean, well-maintained, and the staff were friendly and helpful. We’ve already re-booked for next year — can’t wait to return! Highly recommend this spot for a fun and stress-free family holiday

I stayed at your accommodation with my school from 2/12/2024 to 4/12/2024. I have to say that I had the time of my life whilst at BIG4 Kiama. Everything about it was perfect. The beach, games room and overall layout of the park was the best ever. Don’t get me wrong, I’ve had some great experiences at other places before, but big4 takes the rank as my favourite place to go to. Will hopefully be a regular in the future
Great park definitely goin back great for the kids aswell 👌🏼👌🏼

Such a beautiful spot to spend time with the family and enjoying all the outdoors. Our kids had an amazing time playing with their cousins on the jumping cushion, water slide park, the pool and beach!!! So many kids activities to enjoy as well, cooking, slime making, movies and ice cream bar. The games room was also really cool, with old school games like Pac-Man and space invaders.
We have a 9m long caravan and the site was perfect, right by the creek to watch the duckies each morning. Staff were very helpful and friendly, Vicky was great.
Naturally the park got very busy once the weekend arrived, midweek stays are much preferred.
Shower pressure in amenities is great, just wished the walls went all the way to the ground to avoid water from other showers ‘sharing’ your drain.

Stayed at a seabreeze villa, it is worth it, absolute beachfront and very quiet, beautiful rooms and very spacious, modern bathroom. Kids loved the bunk beds. It was so nice relaxing on the patio and looking at the ocean. Facilities are great, it is very safe for kids to ride around and visit the pool and waterpark. Best holiday park we have been to. We were offered a 4pm checkout which was much appreciated as we got to enjoy the beach for a bit longer. We’ll be back!
The best caravan park in Australia. Outstanding customer service. We always stay in the cabins, very clean and roomy. Pool area is the best.

Facilities were clean and well maintained. The area is well lit. The tent sites are close together. Very family oriented, lots of kids - probably not the most suitable for younger groups and couples. Very busy even out of peak season. Very noisy until 10pm, security guards enforced the noise limit.

A decent walk to the shops / restaurants.
Very clean and tidy..

Booked here for the first time and will definitely be back
Was greeted by lovely staff. Biana was so sweet and helped us feel so welcome.
Thank you so much biana for making a holiday a dream.
Amazing place, excellent for kids. Everything you need for the perfect local holiday.
Whole family has a blast

We stayed on the ensuite site and all I can say is amazing. The bathroom is well maintained and huge which was good to put the car fridge in to power so not always in the car. The site had plenty of room for the van awning and car to be parked all next to one another.
The reception ladies all I can say is amazing. So friendly and had lovely suggestions on where to eat and where to go.
The facilities of the park is perfect. The pools are amazing. It’s the first park I have seen that actually has ramps in the pools for low mobility. 1 heat and one not at this time of year was perfect.
I wish I would have brought my nephews as they would have loved it all, mainly the pools, waterpark, jumping pillow and playground.
We will definitely be back 100%

It is good I liked the pool and the water park. But when the pool and water park is closed it is boring.

Not worth it.

What a great holiday park!
Close to the beach and plenty to do for kids of all ages

The location of the park is incredible - right on the most beautiful swimming beach plus easy access to the coastal walk that leads to others. The park itself is spotlessly clean and the staff at reception were extremely professional and courteous. The best caravan park we've been to.

Thank you to the team and big 4 easts beach Kiama and especially SAM from the first aid team. I got stung by a blue bottle and SAM was very helpful and made sure I was alright right by helping me with my sting.
Thank you and have booked in again for the 5th year in a row
Great place to bring the family
My kids loved the beach, water park and the pool. Our short stay was fun!
We had a lovely time in our caravan at this park. Staff very friendly and helpful and amenities clean and tidy. Highly recommend staying here.
Amazing park to camp at, camped at East's Beach as a kid, and now bringing my kids here, plenty to do with an awesome splash park, jumping pillow and more, will definitely be back again!

This was a great location with great facilities but the customer service was poor. I was advised that I had a 4pm checkout and planned accordingly and was then called on the day demanding keys. The kids were very upset.
What an amazing place. The service and facilities are outstanding. The staff are friendly and helpful. We had a position backing onto the water - stunning. Will return definitely.

We were very impressed with the facilities and services offered at Big4 Easts Beach. The park is super family friendly, even having a children’s bathroom was amazing, having a deep bath sink to bathe my 10 month old while my toddler could use the kids size showers, made camping a breeze.
Everything was well maintained and cleaned. There is a reason this is a premier park on Big 4, it did not disappoint.  We will defiantly stay at this park again.
Great park, very poor TV reception, otherwise 👍

Great location just next to the beach. We did the powered site camping. All the facilities( kitchen, bbq, toilets and shower) were very clean and well worth the price. There is also a cafe in case you don't want to be bothered with cooking yourself. I wish the cafe opened a little later, I think it closes at 4 in the afternoon.

We had a good time at the pool, which had a shallow area for the kids to play. The water park was also heaps of fun.
Had a wonderful weeks stay in the beachfront cabin in the winter with perfect weather. Wonderful facilities and staff. Been coming here for 40 years.

If you are looking for a weekend away (Saturday & Sunday) do NOT waste your time here. Just tried to book a weekend away with the family but I have to spend a minimum of 2 nights in order to have a weekend away. Extremely disappointing in this current economic climate that they are just trying to get more money out of people and not being accomodating. Would not recommend !!!

Great park and location
Had an ensuite site
These ensuites are next level ++
Sites are a little tight for larger caravans

Stayed in the sea side cabins with my niece and her two toddlers. Great accommodation for a 4 day getaway. An hours drive from southern Sydney so not too long for littlest in the car.  Accommodation was just what a family needs. Park facilities are clean and plentiful. Reception was very helpful as were the cleaning staff. We had a wonderful stay.
Nice location, very quiet, you have great view of the beach,  rooms are very clean, the staff are friendly and very attentive.
Paradise

Great family spot. My family of 6 (2 adults and 4 kids) thoroughly enjoyed our weekend here. We stayed in the cabin villa no 2 on the beach. Beautiful scenery every day, the park was always clean, staff came through to empty the bins every day and clean the bbq.
The park had so much for the kids - kids club activities, the pool, water park, game room and the jumping pillow.
The staff were super friendly and very helpful.

The cabin was nice and updated, had everything we needed.
Kiama is a beautiful spot too, so much to explore and with great beauty ❤️

Me and the family will definitely be back.
Always an amazing place to stay

Check in was easy, staff super friendly and welcoming. We stayed in the beach retreat cabin, loved it! Super clean, full kitchen n BBQ set up (just needed to bring out own oil, butter, cleaning products). Perfect views of the beach/ocean! Sitting on the verandah (or even on the lounge) watching the waves was very relaxing. Rooms were set up really nicely, glad the extra warmer blankets were in the cupboards coz the rooms got really cold. Great space for families. We didn't have kids stay in the cabin with us as my brother, sister in law and their kids had their own cabin but they did spend time at our cabin as it was bigger and set out well for families, plus right on the beach. The vibe of the park was really nice too, very family friendly, clean and maintained really well. Only thing to note is internet service both on our phones and the parks WIFI wasnt great so smart tvs would need to be hot spotted from your phone. First time staying, definitely won't be the last. Really enjoyed our weekend here and would definitely recommend 👌
Big 4 Kiama great spot
A great place for families or anyone really so close to the beach, fabulous amenities, cabins well equipped I highly recommend.
We had a great time at the park. Excellent accomodation, facilities were well kept and the staff were great. Definitely coming back in the summer!

Thoroughly enjoyed our short stay at the campervan site. Wished we had booked longer. Our site was next to the creek and overlooking the beach. Amenities was just about 15m walk. Site and amenities are well maintained. Awesome place!
It’s so nice

2nd time staying at the park and  can't fault it. I was a bit hesitant to stay in the cooler months but we still had a great time! Little pool and water park were heated
Clean rooms and clean park. Staffsee are always friendly and approachable.
Lots for kids to do, there's a water park, pool, playground and jumping pillow and a beach!
Less than 5min drive into town.
Already booked for summer!
Best part I got proposed to on the beach!

Excellent park huge sites the best kept clean amenities in our 4 weeks of traveling. The staff upon arrival were very friendly.
We also couldn’t believe the size of the park.
We will be back.

Congratulations

Our experience dealing with Easy Beach Holiday Park was one of the best in all of the year's caravanning, Booking was a breeze, On arrival the reception was awesome, loved my Fridge magnet I got for free 🤗. I have an extra long caravan but was accommodated easily. Close to the Amenities Block. Loved the stream flowing through the camp, within meters from the beach and big well layout BBQ Area under roof, for rain days. All the park staff are very friendly and very helpful. Price wise not an issue with all the quality children play areas, swimming pool, games room, etc, etc.... Wide range of accomodations to choose from, suit all types, Villas, Cabins, powered sites, premium holiday vans, etc, etc.....Love the kiosk, food available, throughout the day. The beach was clean and swimming in the sea was awesome..... Booking for February now ......as we tend to caravan mainly outside school holidays
Great place will be back !
Best park ever

Our family had a great time staying at this fantastic caravan park. It is a well maintained park with a sense of enthusiasm and pride. It's situated on a beautiful beach.
A highlight for us was the kids disco (great host) and the pool (immaculate crystal clear pool). I thoroughly appreciated the 5.30pm movies as it gave me a well deserved break. I'm pretty sure we were camping in an overflow area and it was still brilliant, in fact I'd stay there again anyway. The on-site Cafe is delicious and well priced, so if you don't want to cook sometimes or not at all, they have breakfast, lunch and dinner sorted.
Only slight downside was that all the kids paid activities were booked out, but I'll know for next time to book in advance. At least movies, disco and bingo didn't require booking.
It's a great park and we will be back for sure! Absolutely brilliant!
Very big caravan park with many family friendly facilities.
Great spot to spend some time.
Great family friendly location

If you have young children and are looking for a safe, clean and friendly place to holiday by the beach then this is the place to be.

We have been trying to get a booking here for 4 years and it was worth the wait. Our cabin was great, the water park and wading pool were great, kids activities were well organised and the staff were wonderful.

The beach is small and quiet. There is a long flat stretch that is perfect for little kids to wade in.

There is a reasonably priced cafe and shop on site and the toilets/showers for campers are clean.

We have stayed in several caravan parks and have sometimes had bad experiences with noisy (drunken) neighbours. This was not the case at Easts Beach. People were well behaved and friendly, although, if you have very small children (<5) you need to keep an eye on them in the pool / water park / jumping pillow because there can be groups of rambunctious, excited boys who can be intimidating for the littlies. The jumping pillow was a bit like lord of flies, but the staff did a good job keeping an eye on things.

While Easts Beach is definitely more expensive than staying in a motel or hotel, I found it to be worth the price tag. You're paying for excellent facilities, organised activities for kids, a safe beach only a short stroll from your accommodation and staff who really seem to care about you and your family.

For example, my daughter accidentally left her favourite stuffed toy in our cabin. We only discovered he was missing hours after we got home. We sent the team an email about the lost toy at 9pm and got a phone call the next morning saying her precious toy had been found!

I was so pleased with our experience that I have booked for December 2024 and gone on the wait list for Easter 2025.
Great size campsites and awesome facilities . My grandson loved the waterpark.

Thanks heaps
We have enjoyed our stay, we loved the locations and all facilities, the location is only 5 mins drive from Kiama center where is plenty of restaurants and cafes opens from early morning till late evening

Big thanks to reception staff for the warm and friendly welcome, the check-in was very smooth and took less than few minutes, clear instructions were provided by receptionist, we were happy that the villa was absolutely very clean and tidy, it was the first row overlooking the beach, we enjoyed the heated pool and the kids loved the aqua park as well, the villa has its own BBQ though we didn't use it but it was cery clean
I have watched the sunrise from my villa, it was so beautiful, the park was nice and quiete
Thanks for everything, we would love to come back again
Only onething that could be improved is the internet, i know that are many router spots to provide free wifi access, but i hope the internet connection is to be more steady and faster

Rather than that, everything is perfect !

Great spot for a family holiday. Plenty of stuff for the kids to do. Good, clean facilities in a great location.
Charming wild life about

We had an absolutely wonderful stay with our 3 children. We've stayed at many Parks throughout Australia and this quickly became one of our favourites after our recent stay. Right on a gorgeous beach, lots of facilities for the family which which were all well maintained, helpful staff... the list goes on. We can't wait to be back!!!!
Good clean facilities, very helpful staff, close to shops, beaches and attractions. Very relaxing environment.  Highly recommend.

Easts Beach Holiday Park, Kiama NSW
What an excellent park!  We absolutely loved that just a short stroll from our powered Caravan site the Park has its own coastal super safe, protected & private inlet which was breathtakingly beautiful & especially WOW on sunrise!! Super clean amenities & ground, lots of activities available including a bonus kids school program if you have families. The staff are super friendly, theres a number of free courtesy buses into town which are fantastic. Location of park we found was sensational as have access to the SouthCoast walking trails - nrth, mid, & south options. We definitely will go back. So much to explore in short drive or pushbike distance in a stunning area! Highly recommend!

P.S. we stayed in our van. The cabins onsite however are sensational! There are some right on the beach with the best views ever!

Fantastic park, we stayed in a an ensuite powered site. Bathrooms are first class modern, clean a s spacious.

Great location walking distance to beach. The highlight for our family was the splash park, hours and hours of fun!

Staff are friendly and around if you need anything.

Well done team 👍

We stayed in a powered site. The place was more expensive than a regular caravan park but when you get there you see why. The facilities were well maintained.

The lady I booked up with the first night was lovely we explained that we would be late and she assured us someone would be there to let us in the lady who let us in wasn’t overly friendly and kind of gave us the vibe that we were annoying her rather than being paying guests the next morning we enjoyed our stay so called back to ask about an additional night and stayed a second night we really enjoyed our time here.
Very clean and tidy park

Great location and facilities. Unfortunately we had a group of families tenting around us on powered caravan sites that were up for a party and did not respect all the others in the park that wanted a pleasant and relaxing time. Unfortunately it spoilt our stay. The park should either have an area for these groups away from others or better control the behaviour.
Fantastic camping when going with kids. Beautiful surrounds and great amenities.
Had the most amazing time!! Perfect getaway for kids! Staff were absolutely lovely! The whole family enjoyed our time! Definitely will be booking another Seabreeze villa!!
Great for families
We popped by just to visit friends for the day. The fact they allow you to buy passes just for the day to be able to use the facilities is amazing. Had the best day.
Clean, tidy, private beach

Placing elderly people in the middle of very numerous and noisy children (albeit happy noise) is not thoughtful. The weekend was constant mayhem. There were plenty of more peaceful locations within this lovely park that were vacant over the weekend.
Our way out was to leave and use ear plugs when we were here.

The campsites were gravel, horrible for tents and such, as well as rude staff that blamed their mistake on me, whilst dragging my equipment to a different site while i was out and unreachable, further blaming the mistake of a double booking on me, then when I showed them the mistake they were quick to avoid the situation and not accept responsibility. Poorly managed and unimpressed with lack of respect for us or our equipment. A shame because it is a nice location.
Great place great staff
Great grounds below av rooms ( 2 bedroom villa)

We brought our own campervan, the amenities were among the best we've seen on our journey, staff we're very helpful and efficient,  with plenty of staff on hand so no waiting, beautifully situated with its own beach and a creek running through the site.. a water park and games room for younger children and shop and small cafe on Fri, Sat,and sunday
Nice clean, expensive

Best place for quick and short camping and activities.
Nice and friendly facilities

This place is fantastic, especially if you have kids. Theres all types of accommodation available such as campsites and cabins. The amenities are clean and there’s also a laundry and kitchen facilities too.
With access to the beach, the resort pool, the softfall play area, jumping pillow and Sammy’s Water Splash Park, you really are spoilt for choice. Not to mention a gaming room and in house cafe and a convenience store.
Theres always activities for kids of all ages planned and free movie nights in the function room.
The staff are friendly and very welcoming and nothing is too much trouble.
I highly recommend Big 4 Easts Beach and we’ll definitely be back again.
Location location location. Right in East's Beach. Visited friends during school holidays. Very very busy.

After 20 years of coming to this holiday park with family,  The staff have now told us that we are no longer allowed to book there anymore with no valid reason. Throughout the week of us being there they have complained about anything the kids were doing from playing with their rc cars to playing with a ball. The staff were very rude and racist. If your looking for a relaxing and fun trip for the kids this is not the place.

If you have a family and are wanting to book somewhere kids friendly where they can ride their bikes, play with soccer balls and roam freely. This is not the place to book.

Unfortunately after years of coming to this venue new management have proven themselves to be inconsiderate, rude and unfortunately racist.

From the day of check in to the final days of our holiday they have been picking on the children, accusing family members of abusing others and made us feel the opposite of comfortable and relaxed.

I really hope the Big 4 management realise that they are turning people away.
Awesome so good

Worst Website...Doesn't show Cabin Availability even If I select 100 year date in advance
Can you please fix the issue with your website, its not showing the availability for any future dates. So annoying.
When I gave you a the lady on call said there is an availability but it doesn't show on the website
Amazing caravan park!!!
We didn't use their rooms

A lovely holiday park. We visited a while ago, and we booked to come again in September. We had such an incredible time. We booked a waterfront cabin, wow! The view was amazing. We honestly didn’t want to leave. It was too cold to swim, but we spent hours collecting sea glass and playing in the sand. The pools were great, as was the jumping pillow. The cabin was a little outdated and could probably do with a refurb, but had everything you needed. Staff are super friendly. We arrived late at night after travelling from QLD, they were helpful and ensured we found our cabin. I have spoken with someone from reception recently about getting on a wait list for a waterfront cabin. She was really helpful and went out of her way to assist us. We are really excited to come back again later this year.

My family had a wonderful time and we would like to rebook for next year although it is very difficult to do.
We are not allowed to have the same dates we had this year and have to be on a waitlist as everyone else has first choice to rebook their same holiday dates and cabin. I am still confused about the rules to rebook and even the lady at reception was confused and told us the wrong thing at first.
I will attempt to rebook but it doesnt look promising, i may try to book at a different holiday park to save myself the confusion.
临近圣诞租用了这里，感觉这里的工作人员很负责，每天都看到他们从早到晚在那里忙碌。

What incredible people run this place!!! So friendly and willing to help. I flew in from the United States and had to rent a caravan so that I could see my daughter, who lives in a Toyota Coaster bus. I needed some towels, and they graciously went some to me. They were also willing to give me a pillow and a blanket. Even though I wasn't running one of their cabins. The facility is fabulous. The location is excellent. No bugs, no bin chickens, no turkeys, but lots of lovely doves, seagulls, and cockatoos. And Kiama is an absolutely adorable little coast town.

I have been a loyal patron of Big 4 Kiama for over seven years, visiting annually with six other families. We have always respected the park rules and enjoyed our stays, spending over $3400 on a cabin each time.
This year, due to a change in circumstances, I needed to check out a day early and requested to rebook for the next year in a different cabin. I was not asking for any refunds for checking out early, and I was willing to pay upfront for the next booking. However, I was met with a disappointing response. I was told that if I didn't want the same cabin, I would lose it. I asked if the manager could check and call me back, but the staff member flatly refused.
I understand that there may be policies in place, but the manner in which this was communicated was disappointing. As a long-time customer, I expected a more understanding and accommodating response. I believe that a simple explanation and a more respectful treatment of customers would have made a significant difference.
I hope that Big 4 Kiama takes this feedback into consideration and improves its customer service. It's not just about the policies, but also about how they are communicated and implemented. I believe that loyal customers deserve to be treated with respect and understanding. Remember to keep your tone respectful and objective.

Stayed 7 nights with 3 kids (6-10yrs) loved every bit of it. Powered sites are very generous in size. Very clean amenities, loads of activities for the kids, kids club was active daily during the holiday season. The pool has way too much chlorine, which changes the colour of all our silver jewellery and swimmers and kids complained about sore eyes after.
Besides that. I'd definitely recommend, well be making this an annual trip.
Great location and facilities. So much for kids to do. We will definitely be returning to this park

Great holiday park for kids!

Very clean facility and friendly staffs. Will come back for sure!

Incredible beach walks in both north & south direction. Love that this is a multigenerational family run business. Bathrooms were clean, neighbors were close but quiet, and beach & pool are world class!
We stayed at the camp site. Amenities were good and clean.

Lots to do for the kids with kids club during school holidays, gaming room, swimming pool and amazing water park. Good location as it is right beside the beach and a small drive to the CBD. Awesome cafe as prices were good and food was delicious and staff was friendly. Above all everything was super clean. 5 stars! Definitely a premier park.

We're travelling Aus full-time and our family loved this park. Synthetic site the perfect size. There is a pool to cater for everyone, the water park is perfect size, a really good all ages playground and games room. Loved the on site kiosk and the beach access. Customer service we received was great. We can't wait to come back here 🙌

We have camped here a few times now and can confirm it is an outstanding holiday park. The facilities are high quality, cleanliness and upkeep of the park is superb.

For our most recent stay I had made a mistake with my booking but the reception staff went above and beyond to rectify the problem for me.

Can not recommend this place enough! You won't be disappointed!

We stayed 3 nights at one of the Sunset Villas. Reception staff were very welcoming and friendly.

We stayed there with 3 adults, one 6 year old and an infant and they provided a portacot and bedding for the baby which was great. We stayed there on weekdays so the cafe was unfortunately closed but there were plenty of little shops and Cafe a short drive away.

The splash park kept my kid entertained for hours and the kids pool is heated so was perfect for the cooler days. The beach is walking distance from our cabin and it was beautifully secluded and provided a great view during evening and morning walks.

There is a laundromat and BBQ facilities around the park as well as a small arcade/games room. We enjoyed the stay thoroughly.

The only thing that you need to watch out for is the tap at the sink near the toilet, the spray strength is so strong for a small sink it sprays all over you and the front of your pants making you look like you've wet yourself.
Most beautiful, clean and friendly environment for any type of family to experience and make memories from.
A truly amazing place that is fantastic for families & couples. Get a villa that is on the beach. They're the best.
This place is the size of a small city right on the water great facilities. These guys know how to run a park
What a great park. It's so big & great service

Best family weekend away! Staff are so nice. great location, beach is amazing!
We stayed in a cabin, everything is so clean. The pool and water park are beyond words great. Everything is so well maintained. Cafe on site is so good and cheaper than at home. Our kids asked if we can stay there every weekend
Great place to take your kids, you will so busy when they go back to school you'll need a rest day home.
The best
Great place for a holiday great water park, great coffee and hot food shop right by a golden sand beach! What more could you want
Great family place, there are activities throughout the weekend, awesome waterpark for kids.ammenities are well maintained
Great facilities. Had a great time
10/10 recommend. Great park, great facilities for little kids. We had a powered ensuite site and the shower is AMAZING!!! Best campground shower I’ve ever had.

The park is very well looked after,
We have a great powered site on near the beach.
Enjoying our stay.

Stayed in a Norfolk cabin. Our friends camped. Brilliant facilities. Kids loved it (10 and 7) and they could be independent and explore on their own. Felt very safe. Beach right there. Great location. loved the text messages with updates and letting you know when cabin was ready. Got complimentary late check out until 4pm which was awesome.

Only let down was the wind. So cold and windy!

5 days in our van here..weather & camp were awesome..rebooked for next year as soon as we could..Kids had a ball, even tho water at beach was a tad cold, will definitely be coming back..Thank you Big 4 Kiama..!!

So impressed, we’re going to visit again!

First time staying at a Holiday day park & to be honest wasn’t too excited. Being a city/hotel staycation person normally this was out of my comfort zone. We booked our trip as part of a group of 8 families for 4 days over the busy October long weekend & the park was at max capacity. To be honest I know now I definitely judged it too quickly. We stayed in a 3 bedroom seashell retreat shared between 2 families with 4+ kids that was equipped with everything we needed. Everything inside & outside the house was immaculate. Even the park itself, the beach, pool, water park, outside showers toilets, BBQs & all amenities were spotless. There is always staff up at the crack of dawn cleaning surrounding areas emptying bins and ensuring grounds are kept pristine. All staff we dealt with, even though they were absolutely inundated as the park was at capacity, were helpful polite and lovely to deal with.  Location is also a plus being very close to a 24/7 petrol station, Woolworths & Kiama lighthouse/blowholes. Definitely exceeded my expectations! Highly recommend & am already planning our next visit!

An amazing place for families and childrens
10 points for the kids Disco.
Our granddaughter enjoy every single moment as well as us

Becareful if you’re taking elderly family members and little ones.  My mum had a really bad fall, slipped on their ground green mash mating as it was placed over tree roots at a slope and became extremely slipper. Mum needed surgery after the incident.

This is one of the best CP's we've stayed at. They have everything you need & more. They even have a takeaway kiosk that's open on weekends & sells all your typical takeaway foods.
The play areas for the kids are amazing & our ensuite was nicer than our one at home.
For the first time ever, we messed up our dates & didn't leave the morning we were supposed to. A quick chat with reception had it all sorted & we were only charged $40 for an extra night at an ensuite site. We can't wait to go back here & bring the grandkids.

One word................................

PERFECT!

Booking in was so easy.
Friendly staff, great location and met some friendly people.
I plan to return.
This is a very neat and tidy park, with all the amenities and within walking distance to the beach and surf 😀
Amazing place & staff
My

Fantastic place to stay. Had a cabin right in front of the water and it was so close to the beach. Cabin was very clean and tidy and very happy with it. Great park facilities and the location is perfect as the beach is practically just for the guests!
Beautiful clean place to stay

We have stayed here on the same ensuite site three times in the past year or so.  The water pressure in the shower was the worst we have come across.  The pressure appeared to have been restricted to overcome inadequacies of installation, i.e. normal water pressure flooded the ensuite.  Ground staff and plumber were very responsive in rectifying the situation today, could not have asked for better service.  Given we have on three occasions paid for something of substandard quality, we requested the tariffs be reviewed.  To their credit, management did reduce the tariff for the current stay.  However, refused to do so for the previous stays stating they did not know whether the issue existed at that time despite us telling them it did.  This inferred that we being dishonest in relation to our past stays.  Management could have made good the situation by adjusting the other tariffs, thereby maintaining and indeed enhancing the goodwill of the business but chose not to.
Views were great

All The Staff where absolutely amazing. We travelled from Brisbane QLD to Kiama due to a family members very ill health in hospital and sadly passed away the following day. on arrival they were so helpful and understanding they gave us early check in as my kids myself and partner were all tired from the 13.5 hour drive throughout the night and being so far from home worried about where they would sleep. so not sleeping in the car until check in was just wonderful. And something we will forever be greatful for. They ensured we had everything we needed constantly checking in to make sure we where okay. Muchly appreciated. The accommodation was above average. the park and amenities was kept very clean a park to be proud of. The views where breathtaking and very needed at such a sad time for us. The staff also went above and beyond with short notice that we needed to extend our stay and ensured we had one less stress to deal with. They provided clean linen and towels that we where so greatful for whilst dealing with all the funeral details we where able to just be able to have a hot shower with a clean towel and fresh sheets a small comfort for some but a huge one for us as a hot shower after the days sad events is something we very much needed. The kids pools and playground and games room was also very wonderful a little time away from grieving adults for the kids is just what was needed. Overall 100 stars if we could rate that high. Can not rate this park highly enough. The staff where so supportive and very approachable. A+++ Thank you for all you did for our family. We stayed in Ocean Villa 19!
Ensuite sites are great. Has a Cafe. Beach is quite small. Park is huge. Not sure what it would be like in summer. WiFi can be problematic.
Brilliant place for kids
Amazing place for families, the kids amentities are the best with little toilets and showers. Park is clean and staff is friendly. Also appreciate the baby bath tubs. Thank you!
We have stayed at big 4 and enjoyed it. This time the cabin we had was a little small. Unlike the sunset cabin was much better.
Great location and great place for a family get away
Nice place for family to stay and enjoying holiday

Greeted with gifts for being a big4 member wow. Ok so the park is massive and Amazing, the pool is so good.  There is a water park (next level great) and games room with play centre.  Kids activities room , movies 🎥 at night. You can hear the waves at night and the beach is so beautiful to look at.  Really loved the this place and the town is so amazing.   Thanks again for such a great stay.

great park with very attentive grounds keeper, we stayed for 5 days and he came to sweep our site as there were leaves on it. big bathrooms that are always clean. only issue is the wifi is unreliable in some camp sites.  would come back
Excellent place to take the kids for a holiday love it

Location 👍(On the beach. 👎If you get put at a tent site at the back of the park [that backs onto a train line that is used at 3:50, 4:40 & 5:50 AM!!!])
Ambience 🙂(Nice if you get near the beach)
Reception 😃(Friendly)
Cleanliness ☺️(Very good)
Service 😌(Stuff were busy when I arrived)
Value 🫤($42 for a tent site next to the train line 🤬)

Really nice caravan park. Well maintained, beautiful location. Some sites for trailers/vans are squeezy. Don't know how we would hitch up and drive out if the neighbouring sites were full. That's just our experience. All in all a lovely place especially in off season.

We caravanned for 3 nights in June 2023 (Sat-Tue) on a powered site and were placed opposite the bins and the amenities block. Not ideal, but not too bad either. The park was mostly empty, particularly from Sunday lunchtime.
We found the maintenance/groundsmen to be very helpful and friendly. One young woman at reception was also very cheerful and welcoming.
The kitchen was amazing. Very neat and clean with plenty of BBQs, ovens, stoves, and fridges.
A visit here in summer would be lovely, especially if you had young children because they are well catered for with fun-looking water play equipment. The nearby beach is very calm, making it excellent for young swimmers. The Kiama coastal walk from the south end of the beach was breathtaking with every turn a photo opportunity.

Friendly staff, amazing views, and nice relaxing break from the hustle of City but was able to use very good Wifi and internet at the park and good to see lot of CCTV Cameras around the park. Keep up the good work, and we will be back again in Summer Holidays!!!

Good caravan park on hill with views over the ocean
Close enough to hear the waves

This park has it all!  The staff are above and beyond excellent.  The grounds and amenities are spotless and extremely well-maintained.  Kids will never be bored and there's plenty of space for everyone.  Would book again without a second thought! Loved it.
Great Park but more importantly - wonderful helpful staff who went the extra mile for us!
Absolutely amazing! From location to staff to facilities in park! Highly recommend

Nice place for holiday.
A lot of activities to do around the area, beautiful beach right in front. I recommend anyone go there will love the place.
Great park for kids. Excellent water park, plus pools and jumping pillow. Will definitely return when the weather is a bit warmers
